generated_oml:
ontology DTDFVocab
instance DS18S20RoomTemp : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer for room temperature measurement with -55°C to +125°C range and ±0.5°C accuracy (-10°C to +85°C)",
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataStream
]
instance DS18S20Internal1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer for internal box temperature measurement (first sensor) with -55°C to +125°C range and ±0.5°C accuracy (-10°C to +85°C)",
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataStream
]
instance DS18S20Internal2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer for internal box temperature measurement (second sensor) with -55°C to +125°C range and ±0.5°C accuracy (-10°C to +85°C)",
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataStream
]
instance TemperatureDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DS18S20RoomTemp, DS18S20Internal1, DS18S20Internal2
]
instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "214×214×3 mm heatbed requiring 4A current, controlled via MOSFETs and optocouplers for signal isolation"
]
instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan operating at 12V or 18V with 0.02 m³/s airflow"
]
instance StyrofoamContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container with 0.03 m³ volume"
]
instance RaspberryPi4 : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller hardware"
]
instance CustomPCB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Custom PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for high-current control"
]
instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply for thermal incubator system"
]
instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature measurements from three DS18S20 sensors",
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataStream,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonScipy, INTOCPSOpenSourceSoftware
]
instance INTOCPSOpenSourceSoftware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Open-source software from INTO-CPS Association repository for digital twin services",
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictionService, MonitoringService, ControlService
]
instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Two-parameter thermal model (C_air, G_box) assuming uniform temperature and no heatbed heat accumulation",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo INTOCPSOpenSourceSoftware
]
instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Four-parameter thermal model (C_heater, C_air, G_heater, G_box) accounting for heatbed thermal inertia",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo INTOCPSOpenSourceSoftware
]
instance RabbitMQBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for communication between physical system and digital twin",
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictionService, MonitoringService, ControlService
]
instance RaspberryPi4Controller : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B as controller hardware for digital twin execution",
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictionService, MonitoringService, ControlService
]
instance PythonScipy : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy library for non-linear least squares optimization for model calibration",
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictionService
]
instance PredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature prediction using calibrated dynamic models (Model A and Model B)",
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictionInsight
]
instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Monitoring for safety and optimality violations in temperature regulation",
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationInsight, OptimalityViolationInsight, HumanDecision
]
instance ControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Bang-bang control logic to regulate temperature within predefined upper and lower limits",
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlStatusInsight
]
instance PredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time predicted temperature values from Model A and Model B"
]
instance SafetyViolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected safety violation in temperature exceeding safe operational range"
]
instance OptimalityViolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected optimality violation in temperature deviating from target process requirements"
]
instance ControlStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current control status for temperature regulation within upper and lower limits"
]
instance HumanDecision : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Human decision to adjust physical system based on safety or optimality violation insights",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance ThermalIncubatorEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Thermal incubator system environment with all physical components",
    base:contains StyrofoamContainer, Heatbed, Fan, DS18S20RoomTemp, DS18S20Internal1, DS18S20Internal2, RaspberryPi4, CustomPCB, PowerSupply
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The controller sends actuation commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan speed adjustments) via RabbitMQ to the low-level driver, which translates these into GPIO signals to control the heatbed and fan through MOSFETs and optocouplers."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A RabbitMQ-based communication layer connects the physical twin (sensors, actuators) with virtual twin components (controller, models, calibration algorithms), where the controller processes sensor data and sends actuation commands through RabbitMQ."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin operates in the 'as operated' lifecycle stage, integrating models and data from the deployed physical system for ongoing monitoring and control."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity validated through uniform temperature experiments (Section 4.1) and parameter calibration using least squares minimization of residual error between model predictions and experimental data."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ (AMQP protocol) serves as the technical connection between physical and virtual components, with all communication routed through the RabbitMQ server hosted on the Raspberry Pi."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The digital twin components (RabbitMQ server, controller software, low-level driver) are deployed on a Raspberry Pi 4 Model B, with the communication server running locally on the same hardware as the physical twin controller."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "A safe protocol is incorporated into the low-level driver to maintain device safety, with controller parameters (LL, UL) ensuring temperature regulation within safe limits to prevent overheating."
]
